title: Gvri's Magic Stuff
description: A mod about some Magic things. You have some new tools, which are very powerful but have to be crafted using the gem glazing station.
body:
# Gvri's Magic Stuff
## ABOUT THIS MOD
This is a mod that adds quite some things. I have a Armor set and Tool set which you have to craft using my new block entity.
##
## ARMOR
The armor added are the gem helmet, chestplate, leggings and boots. 
##
## TOOLS
The tools are the gem hoe shovel, sword, axe and pickaxe.
##
## OTHER ITEMS
The other Item I have added is the magic staff of lightning power, a powerful Item, that helps you channel electricity and create lightnings. 
##
## ORES
I have added my mod ores for the overworld, nether and end.
##
## BLOCKS
The only other Bloch is the gemblock and variants for slab, button etc.
##
## MACHINES
I also added one machine called the Gem Glazing Station with which you can craft the new items.
##
## FUTURE UPDATES
In the future, I am planning to add a new Dimension as well as some Mobs.
##
## OTHER INFORMATIONS
You should definitely download this mod, because it adds a new challenge to get better gear after netherite. enjoy.
##
